title: VeriSign: Less Volatility Than Big Names But Keep On Hold (Technical Analysis)
text: Technology sector has been beaten down in 2022, VeriSign's correction was not the worst and on par with S&P 500 return YTD. Technical set up indicates indecision which can resolve itself in next 3-4 months.

title: VeriSign (VRSN) Domain Name Registrations Increase 3.4% Y/Y
text: VeriSign (VRSN) domain name registrations at the end of the third quarter increased by 3.4% year over year.

title: 5 Technology Bigwigs to Buy on the Dip for Gains in 2023
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap technology stocks with attractive valuations. These are: ABNB, FTNT, DDOG, VRSN and PAYC.

title: 3 Tech Stocks Warren Buffett and Ron Baron Agree On
text: According to GuruFocus' Guru Scoreboard, where users can sort investing gurus based on their performances over specific periods of time, one of the top-performing gurus of all time is Warren Buffett (Trades, Portfolio), who has grown Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.A)(BRK.B) at an average rate of 18.80% per year since 1980. Buffett is well-known not only for his investing expertise, but also for turning Berkshire from a struggling textile business to an incredibly well-run conglomerate of successful cash-generating businesses.
